evals.prompt: 把这篇 LinkedIn 文章改写成适合 Twitter/X（280字符限制）、微博和 Bluesky 的格式：[AI will replace 50% of coding jobs by 2027, according to new McKinsey report...]
evals.expected_output: 3 个平台各自独立的帖子，符合各平台字数和风格

evals.prompt: I wrote this Medium article about productivity systems. Cross-post it to LinkedIn, Threads, and X with appropriate adaptations.
evals.expected_output: Platform-specific adaptations with correct length and tone for each

evals.prompt: Help me post this product launch announcement across LinkedIn, Twitter, and WeChat Moments simultaneously.
evals.expected_output: Adapted content for each platform respecting their format constraints
